title: Gmail trigger node authentication issue
symptom: The flow using the Gmail trigger node stopped working and did not trigger any executions. The user noticed error executions while building the flow.
not_this_if: Different node is causing the issue
root_cause: The Gmail trigger node requires proper authentication to function. If the authentication is missing or invalid, the node will not be able to listen for incoming emails, causing the flow to not trigger.
fix_steps: Open the Gmail trigger node settings
Authenticate the node with valid credentials
Test the flow to ensure it triggers correctly
agent_instruction: Authenticate the Gmail trigger node and save the workflow to restore functionality.
